items.title: Gritt exits stealth with $26M Series A for robots that build solar farms
items.note: Robotic arms bolt onto rented construction equipment, installing panels at 3-4x the pace of manual crews

items.title: Infinity raises $15M seed to make any AI chip inference-ready
items.note: OpenAI and Anthropic researchers back the round; its agent Ignition writes chip-specific inference code and takes a cut of the speedup instead of charging a license fee

items.title: Affordable metros hold up better as US housing demand softens
items.note: Absorbed listings fell broadly across 350+ metros for the week of July 17, except homes under $300K which stayed flat

items.title: Israeli defense-tech firm ASIO raises $15M, lands Anduril supply deal
items.note: Protego Ventures-led round comes alongside a deal worth tens of millions for GPS-independent drone navigation components

items.title: Israeli foodtech Plantopia raises $9M to commercialize cow-free dairy proteins
items.note: Schreiber Foods and Siddhi Capital lead the round; production facility at Kibbutz Sdot Yam opens Q3
